text:
was a park attraction featured at on 13 January 2017 to 25 June 2017. It returned as an updated version from 06 July 2018 to 06 January 2019. The ride attraction where you could use the "XR" technology to perfectly with a VR glasses with 360º view. https://www.eva-info.jp/5045 

History

It shows an alternative version of the fight against the Fourth Angel, where the audience watches the battle against the Angel inside an hovercraft piloted by Ryoji Kaji as they flee the battle.
